post https://api.example.com/customers/search

Search customers.


            
await fetch('https://api.example.com/customers/search', {

        

        

            
  method: 'POST',

        

        

            
  headers: {

        

        

            
    accept: 'application/json',

        

        

            
    'content-type': 'application/json',

        

        

            
  },

        

        

            
  body: {

        

        

            
    query: 'ada',

        

        

            
    include_inactive: false,

        

        

            
    limit: 10,

        

        

            
  },

        

        

            
})
